Deprecated API

Contents

  • Methods
  • Methods 
    Method Description
    org.sonarsource.sonarlint.core.client.api.connected.ConnectedSonarLintEngine.getActiveRuleDetails​(EndpointParams, HttpClient, String, String)
    use RulesService#getActiveRuleDetails(String, String) instead
    org.sonarsource.sonarlint.core.client.api.standalone.StandaloneSonarLintEngine.getAllRuleDetails()
    use RulesService.listAllStandaloneRulesDefinitions() instead
    org.sonarsource.sonarlint.core.client.api.standalone.StandaloneSonarLintEngine.getRuleDetails​(String)
    use RulesService.listAllStandaloneRulesDefinitions() and RulesService.getStandaloneRuleDetails(GetStandaloneRuleDescriptionParams) instead
    org.sonarsource.sonarlint.core.proto.Sonarlint.StorageIndex.Builder.getMappedPathByKey()
    org.sonarsource.sonarlint.core.proto.Sonarlint.StorageIndex.Builder.getMutableMappedPathByKey()
    org.sonarsource.sonarlint.core.proto.Sonarlint.StorageIndex.getMappedPathByKey()
    org.sonarsource.sonarlint.core.proto.Sonarlint.StorageIndexOrBuilder.getMappedPathByKey()
